name: Prosciutto Di Parms with Fig Tartletts
recipeIngredient: 8 ounces Prosciutto di Parma, sliced paper thin
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 400°F. Butter a baking dish and set aside.
On a floured surface, make a mound of flour and create a well in the center. Place sugar, eggs, and melted butter into the well. Using a fork, mix ingredients until a medium ball forms. Divide dough into four pieces and shape each into balls. Refrigerate for 15 minutes to rest.
Meanwhile, cut figs into halves.
Remove pastry from refrigerator and roll each piece into a 4 to 5-inch circle, about 1/4-inch thick. Arrange cut fruit on each round with the cut side up. Bake at 400°F for about 20-22 minutes.
Remove tarts from oven, top each with 2 thin slices of Prosciutto, sprinkle with fennel seeds and extra virgin olive oil. Serve.
Yield: 4 servings
